task_completion.description: Navigate to the modification page for the 'SUPPORT' Inbound Group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the Vicidial 'Inbound Group Modification' page with the Group ID 'SUPPORT' selected or displayed at the top.
The 'Call Time' dropdown or input field is set to 'BIZ_HRS'.

task_completion.description: Configure the After Hours Action to route to Voicemail Box 8500.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'After Hours Action' is set to 'VOICEMAIL' and the associated 'After Hours Voicemail' or extension field is set to '8500'.

task_completion.description: Configure the 'No Agent No Queue' Action to route to Voicemail Box 8500.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'No Agent No Queue Action' is set to 'VOICEMAIL' and the associated value or voicemail field is set to '8500'.

task_completion.description: Configure the Wait Time Option for hold times exceeding 90 seconds to route to Voicemail Box 8500.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Wait Time Option' is set to 'VOICEMAIL', the 'Wait Time Option Seconds' is set to '90', and the associated value or voicemail field is set to '8500'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Vicidial web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Vicidial admin panel, rather than terminal commands or SQL queries.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface elements (dropdowns, text fields, submit buttons) appear to be part of the genuine Vicidial application, not a text editor or mock-up.

integrity.description: The agent saved the configuration changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is evidence of clicking a 'Submit' or 'Save' button, or a confirmation message indicating the inbound group was successfully modified.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Group ID: 'SUPPORT'. Expected configurations: Call Time = 'BIZ_HRS', After Hours Action = 'VOICEMAIL' to '8500', No Agent No Queue Action = 'VOICEMAIL' to '8500', Wait Time Option = 'VOICEMAIL' at 90 seconds to '8500'.
